ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "sub" TEXT /* Participant code (e.g., 7p) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group to which the participant belongs (e.g., control, experimental) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was enrolled in the experiment */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "research_question" TEXT /* Research question being addressed */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Study design (e.g., within-subjects, between-subjects) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant in the trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the experiment */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time at which the trial started */,
  "numtargs" INTEGER /* Number of targets in the trial */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the stimuli */,
  "targchar" TEXT /* Target character in the trial */,
  "targcol" TEXT /* Color of the target character */,
  "stim" TEXT /* Stimulus presented in the trial */,
  "resp" INTEGER /* Response of the participant (0 or 1) */,
  "corr" INTEGER /* Correctness of the response (0 or 1) */,
  "rt1" INTEGER /* Reaction time 1 */,
  "rt2" INTEGER /* Reaction time 2 */,
  "fixation_time" INTEGER /* Fixation time before the trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., practice, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_code" TEXT /* Code for the stimulus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of the stimulus */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the stimulus was created */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image, audio, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who gave the response */,
  "response" INTEGER /* Response of the participant (0 or 1) */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Correctness of the response (0 or 1) */,
  "rt1" INTEGER /* Reaction time 1 */,
  "rt2" INTEGER /* Reaction time 2 */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant's response (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_characters" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target character */,
  "target_char" TEXT /* Target character */,
  "target_color" TEXT /* Color of the target character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target character */,
  "target_size" INTEGER /* Size of the target character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_characters_target_color FOREIGN KEY ("target_color") REFERENCES trials ("targcol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_characters_target_char FOREIGN KEY ("target_char") REFERENCES trials ("targchar")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_stimuli" (
  "trial_stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial-stimulus association */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_stimuli_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_stimuli_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trial or experiment */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial or experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial metric */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "avg_rt1" REAL /* Average reaction time 1 */,
  "avg_rt2" REAL /* Average reaction time 2 */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the responses */,
  "num_responses" INTEGER /* Number of responses */,
  "std_dev_rt1" REAL /* Standard deviation of reaction time 1 */,
  "std_dev_rt2" REAL /* Standard deviation of reaction time 2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_metrics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES participant_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_group_memberships_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
